title: Student Registration Eligibilities
description: It provides information on the registration eligibility of the student.

student.title: Student
student.description: The student for which registration eligibility is provided.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Student.

academicPeriod.title: Academic Period
academicPeriod.description: The academic period for which registration eligibility is provided.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Academic Period.

startOn.title: Start On
startOn.description: The date when a student may first register for the academic period.

endOn.title: End On
endOn.description: The last date when a student may register for the academic period.

alternatePin.title: Alternate Pin
alternatePin.description: An indication if an alternate pin is required for the student to register.

eligibilityStatus.title: Eligibility Status
eligibilityStatus.description: The indication if the student is eligible to register for the academic period.

ineligibilityReasons.title: Ineligibility Reasons
ineligibilityReasons.description: The reasons the student is not eligibile to register.

priorityRegistrationTimeSlots.title: Priority Registration Time Slots
priorityRegistrationTimeSlots.description: Time periods when the student is assigned priority registration.

startOn.title: Start On
startOn.description: The date and time when the student's priority registration starts.

endOn.title: End On
endOn.description: The date and time when the student's priority registration ends.
